top3.sql:
WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT bm.striker, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM batsman_scored bs
    JOIN ball_by_ball bm ON bs.match_id = bm.match_id 
        AND bs.over_id = bm.over_id 
        AND bs.ball_id = bm.ball_id 
        AND bs.innings_no = bm.innings_no
    WHERE bm.striker IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bm.striker, bs.match_id
    HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) > 50
)
SELECT AVG(total_runs) 
FROM striker_runs;

WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT bm.striker, bs.match_id, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS match_runs
    FROM batsman_scored bs
    JOIN ball_by_ball bm 
        ON bs.match_id = bm.match_id 
        AND bs.over_id = bm.over_id 
        AND bs.ball_id = bm.ball_id 
        AND bs.innings_no = bm.innings_no
    WHERE bm.striker IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bm.striker, bs.match_id
    HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) > 50
)
SELECT AVG(match_runs) 
FROM striker_runs;

WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT bm.striker, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM batsman_scored bs
    JOIN ball_by_ball bm ON bs.match_id = bm.match_id 
        AND bs.over_id = bm.over_id 
        AND bs.ball_id = bm.ball_id 
        AND bs.innings_no = bm.innings_no
    WHERE bm.striker IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bm.striker, bs.match_id
    HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) > 50
)
SELECT AVG(total_runs) 
FROM striker_runs;

WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT bm.striker, bs.match_id, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS match_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bm
    JOIN batsman_scored bs
        ON bm.match_id = bs.match_id
        AND bm.over_id = bs.over_id
        AND bm.ball_id = bs.ball_id
        AND bm.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    WHERE bm.striker IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bm.striker, bs.match_id
    HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) > 50
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(match_runs), 2) AS avg_runs
FROM striker_runs;

final.sql:
WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT bm.striker, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs
    FROM batsman_scored bs
    JOIN ball_by_ball bm ON bs.match_id = bm.match_id 
        AND bs.over_id = bm.over_id 
        AND bs.ball_id = bm.ball_id 
        AND bs.innings_no = bm.innings_no
    WHERE bm.striker IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY bm.striker, bs.match_id
    HAVING SUM(bs.runs_scored) > 50
)
SELECT AVG(total_runs) 
FROM striker_runs;
